purpose: Execution profiles for skill loading, token budget, validation, and delegation.

fast.notes: Use for small edits, quick answers, and tasks where one skill clearly matches.

deep.notes: Use for broad changes, multi-system work, or explicit subagent requests.

multiagent.notes: Use when the user asks for subagents/multiagents/team/swarm or when independent workstreams materially improve speed or review quality.

saas.notes: Use when building or reviewing SaaS products, dashboards, payments, tenancy, or admin systems.

security.notes: Use only for owned local repos or explicitly authorized staging/preview targets.
